risk_title: Delayed Provincial Policy Approval Affecting Program Implementation
risk_summary: Multiple provinces have missed targets for foundational literacy policy approval, with only federal approval completed. KP and Punjab policies await cabinet approval, and Balochistan approval expected in September 2024. This delays implementation of accelerated foundational literacy programs in lagging districts.
evidence_quote: MoFEPT has approved the FLP for federal area while other provinces missed the target for FY23-24. KP and Punjab have completed the development of the policy and has been put up for approval from the Cabinet. Balochistan has also developed the policy which is expected to be approved in September 2024.

risk_title: Governance Coordination Challenges in Multi-Level Implementation
risk_summary: District-level grant mechanism remains under discussion between MoFEPT and World Bank with no resolution, indicating governance fragility in coordinating federal-provincial-district implementation structures necessary for equitable education delivery.
evidence_quote: The district grants mechanism has been proposed and is under discussion between MoFEPT and WB. The district grants mechanism has been proposed and is under discussion between MoFEPT and WB.

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Constraints in Fiduciary Compliance
risk_summary: Multiple fiduciary system actions are delayed, including consolidated compliance reviews, procurement plan preparation, and SOP streamlining. PCU lacks sufficient resources to conduct required compliance reviews, indicating institutional fragility affecting program governance.
evidence_quote: The action is overdue. PCU of the MoFEPT to hire additional resource to ensure that complainace review is carried out by Jun 2024.

risk_summary: Consolidated procurement plans at provincial and federal levels show delayed completion with only partial achievement of annual targets. Individual consultant review reveals gaps in formal procurement plan preparation, affecting timely delivery of education materials and infrastructure.
evidence_quote: Physical verification of record / assets is being carried out by the Individual Consultant. There are certain areas of improvement with respect to preparation of formal Procurement Plans.

risk_summary: Gross enrollment rates declined in midline due to increased population size nationally, COVID-19 impact, and floods, indicating macroeconomic and environmental shocks affecting vulnerable populations in lagging districts.
evidence_quote: The PDO shows a decline in GER in the midline due an increase in the population size nationally, impact of COVID-19 and floods.
